texto: There's a very big gulf between the black civil rights leadership in America and the black middle class in America. The black middle class are conservative. Many of those minorities can be persuaded to be members of the Republican Party.
explicacao: Citação de Pete du Pont sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “There's a very big gulf between the black civil rights leadership in America and the black middle…” articula lideranca, america, party em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como party e black.
